body:
## đźŽŻ Agentic Issue Triage

This issue tracks the **MPG (Management Plane Generator) migration** of `Azure.ResourceManager.ConfidentialLedger` from Swagger/AutoRest to TypeSpec-based code generation. It is a sub-issue of the parent tracking issue [#53864 - Azure Mgmt Generator migration](https://github.com/Azure/azure-sdk-for-net/issues/53864).

**Package**: `Azure.ResourceManager.ConfidentialLedger` v1.1.0-beta.7 (unreleased)  
**SDK Location**: `/sdk/confidentialledger/Azure.ResourceManager.ConfidentialLedger/`  
**Current state**: AutoRest-based (`<IncludeAutorestDependency>true</IncludeAutorestDependency>` in `.csproj`)

<details>
<summary>đź“‹ Migration Checklist</summary>

- [ ] Locate the TypeSpec spec for ConfidentialLedger in [azure-rest-api-specs](https://github.com/Azure/azure-rest-api-specs) under `specification/confidentialledger/`
- [ ] Set up `tsp-location.yaml` in the SDK folder pointing to the TypeSpec spec
- [ ] Run the mgmt generator locally and compare generated output vs current AutoRest output
- [ ] Identify and address any breaking changes (API surface, serialization, model shapes)
- [ ] Add SDK-side customizations where needed (partial classes, `CodeGenType`, `CodeGenSuppress`, `@@clientName`)
- [ ] Run pre-commit checks: `dotnet format`, export API listings (`eng/scripts/Export-API.ps1 confidentialledger`), update snippets
- [ ] Ensure all existing tests pass; update recorded tests if needed
- [ ] Update `CHANGELOG.md` to reflect migration

</details>

<details>
<summary>đź”§ Debugging / Reproduction Tips</summary>

- The `<IncludeAutorestDependency>true</IncludeAutorestDependency>` flag in the `.csproj` needs to be removed/replaced after migration.
- Use the `mpg-sdk-migration` skill to guide the migration workflow step-by-step.
- To regenerate and validate locally: run the mgmt generator against the TypeSpec spec, then run `dotnet build` and `dotnet test` in the SDK folder.
- Use `GenerateFromSpecLocal.ps1` under `eng/packages/http-client-csharp-mgmt/eng/scripts/` for local generator debugging if needed.
- Watch for common pitfalls: missing `using DiagnosticScope scope = ...` in sync methods (known generator bug), `@@clientName` not applying to ARM resource types, and `WirePathAttribute` if enabled.

</details>

<details>
<summary>đź“š Useful Resources</summary>

- [mpg-sdk-migration skill](https://github.com/Azure/azure-sdk-for-net/blob/main/.github/skills/mpg-sdk-migration/SKILL.md) â€” step-by-step migration guide
- [mitigate-breaking-changes skill](https://github.com/Azure/azure-sdk-for-net/blob/main/.github/skills/mitigate-breaking-changes/SKILL.md) â€” patterns for handling breaking changes
- [Parent tracking issue #53864](https://github.com/Azure/azure-sdk-for-net/issues/53864)
- [Completed migrations tracking #55080](https://github.com/Azure/azure-sdk-for-net/issues/55080)
- [TypeSpec ConfidentialLedger spec](https://github.com/Azure/azure-rest-api-specs/tree/main/specification/confidentialledger/resource-manager)

</details>
